creator: gerard_seibert@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to karl from comment #1)

Removing Samba43 first allows me to build the port. This is my /etc/make.conf file:

DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=  ssl=openssl
MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes

openssl info:

$ which openssl
/usr/local/bin/openssl

$ openssl version
OpenSSL 1.0.2h 3 May 2016
